source_pr.title: planner: support hint for IndexHashJoin and IndexMergeJoin
source_pr.body:
<!--
Thank you for contributing to TiDB! Please read TiDB's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/pingcap/community/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document **BEFORE** filing this PR.
-->

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->
~1. fix issue https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/12309~
2. support hint for IndexHashJoin and IndexMergeJoin

### What is changed and how it works?


### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - Integration test

Code changes

N/A

Side effects

N/A

Related changes

N/A

Release note

N/A

symptoms: gopkg.in/alecthomas/kingpin.v3-unstable v3.0.0-20180810215634-df19058c872c/go.mod h1:3HH7i1SgMqlzxCcBmUHW657sD4Kvv9sC3HpL3YukzwA= | tk.MustQuery("explain select /*+ INL_HASH_JOIN(s) */ * from t left join s on t.a=s.a order by t.pk").Check(testkit.Rows( (executor/join_test.go)
failure_signature: gopkg.in/alecthomas/kingpin.v3-unstable v3.0.0-20180810215634-df19058c872c/go.mod h1:3HH7i1SgMqlzxCcBmUHW657sD4Kvv9sC3HpL3YukzwA= | tk.MustQuery("explain select /*+ INL_HASH_JOIN(s) */ * from t left join s on t.a=s.a order by t.pk").Check(testkit.Rows( (executor/join_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it relied on nondeterministic result ordering (e.g., missing ORDER BY / unsorted assertions). Result ordering is not guaranteed unless explicitly enforced. This PR stabilizes it by: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: gopkg.in/alecthomas/kingpin.v3-unstable v3.0.0-20180810215634-df19058c872c/go.mod h1:3HH7i1SgMqlzxCcBmUHW657sD4Kvv9sC3HpL3YukzwA= | tk.MustQuery("explain select /*+ INL_HASH_JOIN(s) */ * from t left join s on t.a=s.a order by t.pk").Check(testkit.Rows( (executor/join_test.go)
